subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 795918973/260323025 is not a GRB
body:
S. Bala (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 795918973/260323025 at 00:36:08.73 UT
on 23 March 2026, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle event."
